Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: At odds with your initial meeting, French Kweebec is not very enthusiastic the next time that you find him.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Ah, mon ami. You have not come at a good moment, I am afraid.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: My thoughts are stuck in un circuit of their own. I must take some time to deal with them.
